case_title: ADVANCED FINANCIAL SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. J & S QUALITY SEAFOODS INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADVANCED FINANCIAL SOLUTIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT J & S QUALITY SEAFOODS INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANCED FINANCIAL SOLUTIONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT J & S QUALITY SEAFOODS INC. $63,999.28 PRINCIPAL, $3,450.70 INTEREST, $224.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $67,674.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
